prompt: I want to start DV on my APB UART block. The spec is at /Users/apple/Documents/DV-Skills/skills/dv-spec-parse/evals/test_specs/apb_uart_spec.md and the project name is apb_uart. Save outputs to the output directory.

assertions.text: dv_spec_summary.md is created in output directory
dv_spec_summary.json is created in output directory

assertions.evidence: Terminal summary confirms all sections present; 6 features, 21 sub-features, 3 interfaces, 18 signals, 4 params, 1 clock, 5 modes, 2 compliance stds extracted

assertions.text: JSON file is valid with all required fields populated
assertions.evidence: Agent confirmed valid JSON with project_name, features, interfaces, parameters, clock_domains, reset_strategy all present
6 features extracted: APB interface, TX, RX, baud rate generator, flow control, interrupts
18 signals across 3 interfaces; all 10 APB signals confirmed present

assertions.text: Terminal summary printed with item counts
assertions.evidence: Full terminal summary block printed with all counts and NEEDS_REVIEW count of 5
